'''Missile droids''' were flimsy [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] used in large numbers by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were used in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] during the [[Battle of Dubrillion (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Dubrillion]], where they attempted to hinder [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. They spewed a seemingly infinite number of [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]].

These droids flew or hovered in the air, often at the same level as the cockpit of an enemy vehicle. When Wedge Antilles was engaged by these droids on [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]], he learned that they were not heavily armored, and a few blasts from an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] could easily destroy them.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Tiehunter_concept.jpg|left|thumb|Missile droid concept art]]
The missile droids appear in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''
